name: PR Newswire Press Release Distribution API
what_it_does: PR Newswire press release distribution REST API for communications and PR teams to distribute news releases to media outlets, journalists, newsrooms, and financial data terminals through the largest newswire distribution network. Enables AI agents to manage press release submission and editorial review for news distribution automation, handle targeted media list distribution by geography, industry, and outlet type for PR outreach automation, access financial news distribution to Bloomberg, Reuters, SEC EDGAR for investor relations automation, retrieve distribution confirmation and pickup reporting for PR measurement automation, manage multimedia attachment (images, video, boilerplate) for rich press release automation, handle embargo and scheduled release timing for communications planning automation, access media pickup tracking and earned media monitoring for PR analytics automation, retrieve SEO-optimized release distribution for content discoverability automation, manage multilingual press release distribution for global communications automation, and integrate PR Newswire with Cision PR software, media monitoring, and investor relations platforms for end-to-end communications distribution automation.
use_cases: Distributing press releases from corporate communications agents
Filing financial disclosures from investor relations agents
Tracking media pickup from PR measurement agents
Scheduling embargoed news from communications planning agents
not_for: Social media content distribution (use social media management tools)
Email marketing to customer lists (use Mailchimp or HubSpot)
Internal company announcements (use Workvivo or Staffbase)
best_when: A corporate communications team or PR agency wanting AI agents to automate press release distribution, financial disclosure filing, media pickup tracking, and global news distribution through PR Newswire's established media distribution network.
avoid_when: SEC REGULATION FD FOR MATERIAL INFORMATION DISCLOSURE: Automated press release distribution of material corporate information via PR Newswire must comply with SEC Regulation FD (Fair Disclosure); automated financial disclosure must include simultaneous broad public distribution; automated selective disclosure to subset of journalists before broad distribution creates Reg FD violation. PRESS RELEASE EDITORIAL REVIEW LEAD TIME: PR Newswire editorial review has processing time (several hours for standard, same-day for expedited with premium fee); automated press release submission must account for editorial review lead time; automated submission expecting immediate distribution creates timing miss for time-sensitive news. EMBARGOED RELEASE BREACH RISK FROM AUTOMATION: Automated embargoed release distribution to media must have controls preventing early distribution; automated embargo management system failure creating early release causes media breach damage and regulatory issue for embargoed financial information.

auth.notes: PR Newswire uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 1954. Acquired by Cision in 2016 ($841M). Parent: Cision (private, Apollo Global Management). Network: 170,000+ media outlets, 1.7M+ journalists, 10,000 media points of contact. Products: Newswire distribution, financial disclosure, multimedia, translation, monitoring. SEC filing partner. Bloomberg and Reuters terminals. Competes with Business Wire (Berkshire Hathaway) and Globe Newswire (Notified/Intrado) for press release distribution.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-release distribution fee
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-release fee based on word count, distribution radius, and multimedia; national US release $450-$800+; add-ons for international, industry, and financial distribution
pricing.notes: New York NY. Cision/Apollo Global subsidiary. Per-release pricing. National/international distribution tiers. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; release submission throttled; webhooks for distribution confirmation and pickup events

known_agent_gotchas: EDITORIAL REVIEW QUEUE CREATES ASYNCHRONOUS DISTRIBUTION: PR Newswire editorial review is not instant; automated distribution assumes review passes without revision; automated releases with editorial issues (prohibited content, factual claims, formatting problems) are delayed or rejected; implement pre-submission checklist validation before automated submission

MULTIMEDIA ATTACHMENT SIZE AND FORMAT REQUIREMENTS: PR Newswire multimedia requirements have specific size, format, and caption requirements; automated attachment of press photos must meet format specifications; automated attachment of non-compliant images creates editorial rejection or additional formatting fees

FINANCIAL REGULATORY DISCLOSURE SIMULTANEOUS DISTRIBUTION REQUIREMENT: SEC Regulation FD requires material information to be disclosed to all investors simultaneously; automated financial news distribution must use PR Newswire's simultaneous broad distribution; phased automated distribution creates Reg FD violation window

INTERNATIONAL DISTRIBUTION TRANSLATION QUALITY: PR Newswire international distribution offers translation services; automated translation for non-English markets has quality variance; automated machine translation without review for technical or legal press releases creates brand and legal risk from translation errors

PICKUP TRACKING DATA AVAILABILITY DELAY: PR Newswire media pickup tracking data is compiled after distribution and has 24-48 hour delay for full pickup reporting; automated PR measurement that queries pickup immediately after distribution receives incomplete pickup data; schedule automated pickup reporting with appropriate delay for complete data availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Press release distribution. SOC2, SEC Reg FD compliance. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Press release and media distribution data.

security_score_components.security_notes: News distribution. SOC2, SEC Reg FD. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Press release and financial disclosure data.
